whatsNew.en:
A fresh look for your day.

- The "Today" card on the Calendar has a new design — your day's color now fills the card, so work, rest, and leave days stand out at a glance, with a cleaner layout and a circular type icon.
- Tap the Today card to jump straight into editing today.
- Smoother Dashboard switching and calendar month transitions, plus small visual polish throughout.

Version 4.1.1

• Updated App Store screenshots to better reflect the latest SShift design.

Thank you for using SShift.

Version 4.1

- New "Same day" reminder option — get notified on the day of your shift.

- Per-leave-type notifications — choose exactly which leave types should remind you.

- Clearer Notifications settings — improved permission guidance when iOS notifications are off.

- Smarter notification handling — old reminders are now cleaned up after clearing or restoring schedule data.

- Better first-run experience — new users now see a clear Set Up Schedule card when no schedule exists.

- Improved Backup and Restore feedback — failed backup or restore actions now show a clear message.

- Updated About page with the SShift app logo.

Thank you for using SShift.

Improved Arabic language and right-to-left layout support across the app.
Redesigned PDF export with a clean, always-light printable design.
New per-leave-type breakdown on the Dashboard.
Localization polish, release prep, and stability improvements.

This update includes a refreshed app icon and launch experience, improved dashboard card layout, cleaner Settings icons and spacing, better bottom navigation consistency, plus bug fixes, stability improvements, and overall UI polish.

Version 3.0 brings a major refresh to SShift with a cleaner interface, improved calendar editing, a redesigned dashboard, better settings organization, Arabic support, and a more polished overall experience.

What’s new:
• Redesigned dashboard with cleaner stats and upcoming summaries
• Improved settings layout and better visual organization
• Better About page with a clearer feature overview
• Improved calendar editing for empty days and leave selection
• Better in-app language support for English and Arabic
• Updated visuals across key screens for a cleaner experience
• Improved launch experience and overall polish
• Stability improvements and general fixes
Welcome to SShift 2.0 — a cleaner UI, a clearer calendar, smarter notes, and faster performance. Simpler, smoother, better.

This update focuses on accessibility, performance, and reliability:

• Full VoiceOver support — every screen and selectable item is now properly labeled and announced.
• Smoother scrolling through large photo and video libraries, with lower memory use on big collections.
• Safer, more reliable contacts cleanup — clearer confirmations, and delete and merge now keep a recoverable backup before anything is removed.
• Improved reliability when converting and sharing photos and videos.
• Additional stability and performance refinements.

Pay Soon: for short-term amounts and money you pay off with your monthly salary — completely separate from your long-term installments. Add the amount and its due date, and follow each month at a glance: what's paid, what's still due, and what's overdue.

Improved PDF reports: choose the report period, attach your payment proofs, and combine everything into one tidy file that's ready to share.

Performance improvements and fixes for a smoother, clearer experience.
whatsNew.ar:
قسم "للتسديد": للسلف والمبالغ المؤقتة التي تسدّدها على راتبك — منفصلة تمامًا عن أقساطك طويلة المدى. أضِف المبلغ وتاريخ استحقاقه، وتابع كل شهر بنظرة واحدة: ما دُفع، وما تبقّى، وما تأخّر.

تقارير PDF محسّنة: اختر فترة التقرير، أرفِق إثباتات الدفع، ووحّدها في ملف واحد مرتّب جاهز للمشاركة.

تحسينات في الأداء وإصلاحات لتجربة أسلس وأوضح.

whatsNew.en:
A whole new look

Dufaat is calmer and more beautiful — a warm new visual identity with luminous touches that makes tracking your installments a relaxed experience.

What's new:
- A completely redesigned, warm and refined look in both light and dark mode
- Defer payments: officially postpone any payment — it shows as "Deferred" instead of "Overdue," moves to the end of the schedule, and your plan's end date updates automatically
- The Completed plans list is now open by default
- Polish and refinements across every screen

Thank you for using Dufaat
whatsNew.ar:
تصميم جديد بالكامل

دُفعات صار أهدأ وأجمل — هوية بصرية جديدة دافئة مع لمسات مضيئة، تخلّي متابعة أقساطك تجربة مريحة.

الجديد في هذا الإصدار:
- تصميم جديد كليًا بمظهر دافئ وأنيق في الوضعين الفاتح والداكن
- تأجيل الأقساط: أجّل أي قسط بشكل رسمي — يظهر "مؤجَّل" بدل "متأخر"، ويُرحّل لنهاية الجدول، ويتحدّث تاريخ انتهاء الخطة تلقائيًا
- قائمة الخطط المكتملة صارت مفتوحة افتراضيًا
- تحسينات وصقل في كل الشاشات

شكرًا لاستخدامك دُفعات
